QunaSys, a leading innovator in quantum-chemistry software with a Japan–Europe footprint, and Hon Hai Research Institute, the research arm of Hon Hai Technology Group (Foxconn), today announced the acceptance of their joint research paper _“Neural Network Assisted Fermionic Compression Encoding: A Lossy-QSCI Framework for Scalable Quantum Chemistry Simulations”_ in _Physical Review Research_.
